languages.text: {n}Человек поднимает на вас затуманенный взгляд.{/n} "Простите, Лорд-капитан. Я больше не могу терпеть. Я должен выбраться из оков".

traits.locale_text: {n}Человек поднимает на вас затуманенный взгляд.{/n} "Простите, Лорд-капитан. Я больше не могу терпеть. Я должен выбраться из оков".

languages.text: {n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."
languages.original_text: {n}Человек поднимает на вас затуманенный взгляд.{/n} "Простите, Лорд-капитан. Я больше не могу терпеть. Я должен выбраться из оков".

{n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."
{n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."
{n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."

languages.text: {n}Der Mann blickt mit verschleiertem Blick zu dir auf.{/n} "Vergebt mir, Lord Captain. Ich kann nicht mehr. Ich muss mich von diesen Fesseln befreien."
languages.original_text: {n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Mann blickt mit verschleiertem Blick zu dir auf.{/n} "Vergebt mir, Lord Captain. Ich kann nicht mehr. Ich muss mich von diesen Fesseln befreien."

languages.text: {n}L'homme lève les yeux vers vous, le regard trouble.{/n} « Mes excuses, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Mais je ne le supporte plus. Je dois me libérer de ces chaînes. »
languages.original_text: {n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'homme lève les yeux vers vous, le regard trouble.{/n} « Mes excuses, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Mais je ne le supporte plus. Je dois me libérer de ces chaînes. »

languages.text: {n}男人抬起浑浊的目光看向你。{/n}“原谅我，舰长大人。我实在撑不住了。我必须挣脱这枷锁。”
languages.original_text: {n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."

traits.locale_text: {n}男人抬起浑浊的目光看向你。{/n}“原谅我，舰长大人。我实在撑不住了。我必须挣脱这枷锁。”

languages.text: {n}El hombre levanta la vista y clava en ti sus ojos nublados.{/n} «Lo siento, Lord Capitán. No lo soporto más. Debo liberarme de estos grilletes».
languages.original_text: {n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."

traits.locale_text: {n}El hombre levanta la vista y clava en ti sus ojos nublados.{/n} «Lo siento, Lord Capitán. No lo soporto más. Debo liberarme de estos grilletes».

languages.text: {n}男は曇ったまなざしであなたを見上げる。{/n}「お許しください、ロード・キャプテン。もう我慢できません。この束縛から解き放たねばなりません」
languages.original_text: {n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."

traits.locale_text: {n}男は曇ったまなざしであなたを見上げる。{/n}「お許しください、ロード・キャプテン。もう我慢できません。この束縛から解き放たねばなりません」

languages.text: {n}Adam, buğulu bir bakışla sana bakıyor.{/n} "Beni affedin Lord Kaptan. Artık dayanamıyorum. Bu prangalardan kurtulmalıyım."
languages.original_text: {n}The man looks up at you with a clouded gaze.{/n} "Forgive me, Lord Captain. I cannot take it anymore. I must break free from these shackles."
